description: Core tools for working with streams. Provides the Python interfaces to stream handling including StringIO and BytesIO in-memory streams.

functions.name: open
functions.signature: open(file, mode='r', buffering=-1, encoding=None, errors=None, newline=None, closefd=True)

params.name: file
params.description: File path (string) or an existing file descriptor (integer).

params.name: mode
params.description: File mode: 'r' (read), 'w' (write), 'a' (append), 'b' (binary), 't' (text), '+' (update). Combinations allowed, e.g. 'rb', 'w+b'.

params.name: buffering
params.description: Buffering policy: 0 for unbuffered (binary only), 1 for line buffered (text only), >1 for buffer size in bytes, -1 for system default.

params.name: encoding
params.description: Text encoding to use (e.g. 'utf-8'). Only used in text mode.

params.name: errors
params.description: How encoding errors are handled: 'strict', 'ignore', 'replace', etc. Only used in text mode.

params.name: newline
params.description: Controls newline translation. None enables universal newlines. Only used in text mode.

params.name: closefd
params.description: If False and a file descriptor was given, the underlying FD is kept open when the file object is closed.

returns.description: A file object whose type depends on the mode: BufferedReader, BufferedWriter, BufferedRandom, TextIOWrapper, or FileIO.

functions.description: Open a file and return a corresponding stream. This is the io module's version of the built-in open() function, providing more control over buffering and encoding.

classes.name: StringIO
classes.description: An in-memory stream for unicode text. The text buffer is discarded when close() is called. StringIO objects can be used as context managers.

params.name: initial_value
params.description: Initial contents of the buffer. Must be a unicode string.

params.name: newline
params.description: Controls newline translation. None enables universal newlines on read.

constructors.description: Create a new StringIO object with optional initial contents.

methods.name: read

params.name: size
params.description: Maximum number of characters to read. -1 reads to the end.

returns.description: Unicode string of the data read.

methods.description: Read at most size characters from the stream. If size is -1 or None, read until EOF.

methods.name: readline

params.name: size
params.description: Maximum number of characters to read. -1 reads a full line.

returns.description: A single line from the stream including the newline character.

methods.description: Read and return one line from the stream. If size is specified, at most size characters are read.

methods.name: readlines

params.name: hint
params.description: Approximate number of characters to read. -1 reads all lines.

returns.description: List of lines from the stream.

methods.description: Read and return a list of lines from the stream. The hint parameter controls how many lines are read.

methods.name: write

params.name: s
params.description: Unicode string to write.

methods.description: Write the unicode string s to the stream and return the number of characters written.

methods.name: writelines

params.name: lines
params.description: Iterable of unicode strings to write.

methods.description: Write a list of lines to the stream. Line separators are not added between the strings.

methods.name: getvalue

returns.description: The entire contents of the buffer.

methods.description: Return the entire contents of the buffer. This does not affect the read/write position.

methods.name: seek

params.name: offset
params.description: Position offset.

params.name: whence
params.description: 0 = from start, 1 = from current position, 2 = from end.

methods.description: Change the stream position to the given offset. The whence parameter determines the reference point.

methods.name: tell
methods.description: Return the current stream position.

methods.name: close
methods.description: Flush and close the stream. The buffer contents are discarded. Further operations on a closed stream will raise ValueError.

methods.name: truncate

params.name: size
params.description: Truncate to at most this size. Defaults to the current position.

methods.description: Truncate the stream to at most size characters. The current position is not changed.

methods.name: isatty
methods.description: Return False. StringIO objects are not connected to a terminal.

classes.name: BytesIO
classes.description: An in-memory stream for bytes data. The buffer is discarded when close() is called. BytesIO objects can be used as context managers.

params.name: initial_bytes
params.description: Initial contents of the buffer. Must be a bytes/str object.

constructors.description: Create a new BytesIO object with optional initial contents.

methods.name: read

params.name: size
params.description: Maximum number of bytes to read. -1 reads to the end.

returns.description: Bytes string of the data read.

methods.description: Read at most size bytes from the stream. If size is -1 or None, read until EOF.

methods.name: readline

params.name: size
params.description: Maximum number of bytes to read. -1 reads a full line.

returns.description: A single line from the stream including the newline character.

methods.description: Read and return one line from the stream. If size is specified, at most size bytes are read.

methods.name: readlines

params.name: hint
params.description: Approximate number of bytes to read. -1 reads all lines.

returns.description: List of lines from the stream.

methods.description: Read and return a list of lines from the stream.

methods.name: write

params.name: b
params.description: Bytes to write.

methods.description: Write the bytes string b to the stream and return the number of bytes written.

methods.name: writelines

params.name: lines
params.description: Iterable of bytes strings to write.

methods.description: Write a list of bytes lines to the stream. Line separators are not added.

methods.name: getvalue

returns.description: The entire contents of the buffer as a bytes string.

methods.description: Return the entire contents of the buffer as a bytes string.

methods.name: seek

params.name: offset
params.description: Position offset in bytes.

params.name: whence
params.description: 0 = from start, 1 = from current position, 2 = from end.

methods.description: Change the stream position to the given byte offset.

methods.name: tell
methods.description: Return the current stream position.

methods.name: close
methods.description: Flush and close the stream. The buffer contents are discarded.

methods.name: truncate

params.name: size
params.description: Truncate to at most this size. Defaults to the current position.

methods.description: Truncate the stream to at most size bytes.

methods.name: isatty
methods.description: Return False. BytesIO objects are not connected to a terminal.

classes.name: BufferedReader
classes.description: A buffered I/O implementation providing a readable interface over a raw binary stream (RawIOBase).

params.name: raw
params.description: The underlying raw binary stream.

params.name: buffer_size
params.description: Size of the internal buffer in bytes.

constructors.description: Create a BufferedReader wrapping the given raw stream.

methods.name: read

params.name: size
params.description: Number of bytes to read. -1 reads to EOF.

methods.description: Read and return up to size bytes.

methods.name: read1

params.name: size
params.description: Number of bytes to read.

returns.description: Bytes read with at most one call to the underlying raw stream.

methods.description: Read and return up to size bytes with at most one call to the underlying raw stream's read() method.

methods.name: peek

params.name: size
params.description: Approximate number of bytes to peek at.

returns.description: Bytes from the buffer without advancing the position.

methods.description: Return bytes from the buffer without advancing the position. At most one single read on the raw stream is done to satisfy the call.

methods.name: readline

params.name: size
params.description: Maximum number of bytes to read.

returns.description: A single line from the stream.

methods.description: Read and return one line from the stream.

methods.name: close
methods.description: Flush and close the stream.

classes.name: BufferedWriter
classes.description: A buffered I/O implementation providing a writable interface over a raw binary stream (RawIOBase).

params.name: raw
params.description: The underlying raw binary stream.

params.name: buffer_size
params.description: Size of the internal buffer in bytes.

constructors.description: Create a BufferedWriter wrapping the given raw stream.

methods.name: write

params.name: b
params.description: Bytes to write.

methods.description: Write the bytes-like object b and return the number of bytes written.

methods.name: flush
methods.description: Force bytes held in the buffer into the raw stream.

methods.name: close
methods.description: Flush and close the stream.

classes.name: TextIOWrapper
classes.description: A buffered text stream over a BufferedIOBase binary stream. Provides encoding and decoding of text data.

params.name: buffer
params.description: The underlying buffered binary stream.

params.name: encoding
params.description: Text encoding name (e.g. 'utf-8'). Defaults to locale.getpreferredencoding().

params.name: errors
params.description: Error handling mode: 'strict', 'ignore', 'replace', etc.

params.name: newline
params.description: Controls newline translation. None enables universal newlines.

params.name: line_buffering
params.description: If True, flush on every line terminator.

constructors.description: Create a TextIOWrapper around a buffered binary stream.

methods.name: read

params.name: size
params.description: Maximum number of characters to read. -1 reads to EOF.

methods.description: Read and return at most size characters from the stream.

methods.name: readline

params.name: size
params.description: Maximum number of characters to read.

returns.description: A single line from the stream.

methods.description: Read until newline or EOF and return a single line.

methods.name: write

params.name: s
params.description: Unicode string to write.

methods.description: Write the string s to the stream and return the number of characters written.

methods.name: close
methods.description: Flush and close the stream and its underlying buffer.

fields.name: encoding
fields.description: The name of the encoding used by this stream.

fields.name: errors
fields.description: The error setting of the decoder or encoder.

classes.name: FileIO
classes.description: A raw binary stream representing an OS-level file. Provides unbuffered, low-level access to a file descriptor.

params.name: name
params.description: File path (string) or file descriptor (integer).

params.name: mode
params.description: File mode: 'r' (read), 'w' (write), 'a' (append), 'r+' (read/write).

params.name: closefd
params.description: If False and a file descriptor was given, the FD is kept open when the FileIO is closed.

constructors.description: Open a file for low-level unbuffered binary I/O.

methods.name: read

params.name: size
params.description: Number of bytes to read. -1 reads to EOF.

methods.description: Read and return up to size bytes. Returns an empty string at EOF.

methods.name: readall

returns.description: All remaining bytes in the file.

methods.description: Read and return all bytes from the file until EOF.

methods.name: write

params.name: b
params.description: Bytes to write.

methods.description: Write the bytes b to the file and return the number of bytes written.

methods.name: seek

params.name: offset
params.description: Position offset in bytes.

params.name: whence
params.description: 0 = from start, 1 = from current position, 2 = from end.

methods.description: Move to a new file position.

methods.name: tell
methods.description: Return the current file position.

methods.name: close
methods.description: Close the file. A closed file cannot be read or written to.

methods.name: fileno
methods.description: Return the underlying file descriptor (integer).

fields.name: name
fields.description: The file name or file descriptor number.

fields.name: mode
fields.description: The mode string given in the constructor.

fields.name: closefd
fields.description: Whether the file descriptor will be closed.
